assertions.text: The agent creates the four founder docs: me.md, vision.md, design.md, and workingstyle.md.
The agent runs a per-file interview to gather content for each document.
The slash command invokes the founder-context bootstrap workflow.
The agent produces me.md, vision.md, design.md, and workingstyle.md.
The agent enters single-file mode and only generates vision.md.
The agent interviews the user specifically for the vision.md content.
The agent routes this request to the project-context-md skill.
The agent does not trigger the founder-context four-file bootstrap for a CLAUDE.md request.
The agent routes this landing-page design request to the simon-design-first skill.
The agent does not trigger founder-context for a landing page design request.
